title: Henbrandt Pack of 10 Gold Party Candles with Candle Holders, Gold Spiral Celebration Candles for Birthday Cakes Wedding Party Baby Showers and Anniversary Decorations
features: Pack of 10 Gold Party Candles with candle holders.
These shimmering spiral gold candles are ideal for birthday cakes, baby showers and anniversary celebrations.
One box contains 10 candles and 10 candle holders, for use 2-3 times.
These candles measure around 6cm in height.
Recommended for ages 14+. These cake candles should be used under adult supervision and children should not be left alone with lit flames.
description: Product description These incredible metallic gold party candles are perfect for illuminating cakes, with an elegant spiral design ideal for all ages and celebrations, whether a special birthday, wedding celebration, anniversary party, or baby shower. Each box of gold party candles includes 10 gold candles and 10 gold candle holders, which can be used between 2 and 3 times. Simply attach the holder to the candle, place on a cake, and light for a truly beautiful display. Use these gold party candles responsibly. These cake candles are recommended for ages 14 and above and are not to be used without adult supervision. Candles are approx. 6cm in height. Single pack of 10 gold party candles per order. The party candles are non-toxic, and are compliant with all applicable UK and EU candle safety requirements. Safety Warning These candles are recommended for ages 14 and up. These cake candles should be used under adult supervision and children should not be left alone with burning flames.
